session_note: S42 — BUG-CRITICAL-1: Real-Time 1v1 Restoration. User reported turn-based gameplay (PLAYER 2'S TURN · SPACE to end) shipped in S15 P2 contradicts SPARK_Blueprint.md:3 'Real-Time Multiplayer'. Both players cannot act simultaneously; non-active-player Intents silently rejected by requireActivePlayer gate; primitives snap back to spawn for non-active player. Full teardown of turn-based system + first-Intent-wins race resolution + diagnostics counter for observability.
council_invoked: 2026-05-24 Council R1 (grok_chat + gemini_chat parallel) + R2 (synthesis refinement parallel). Battle Ledger 6 decisions (5 ADOPT, 1 REJECT). HIGH confidence. PRIME-AUDIT Δ1-Δ6 inline.

priorities.label: S42 P2 — Strip turn-based reducer gating + add diagnostics counter + silent-return on shared-resource races. DELETE authGate.ts. Remove requireActivePlayer calls in sparkLifecycle (PICKUP+DROP), world.ts dispatch (PLACE_PRIMITIVE), disruptionManager (canSeverBond). Add World.diagnostics.raceRejects field + init. applyPickupSpark line 90 throw→silent+counter. placePrimitive line 131 throw→silent+counter.

S42 P3 — Strip END_TURN action + currentPlayerId field. Remove applyEndTurn, EndTurnAction type, dispatch case, GameAction union member. Remove currentPlayerId field from World, makeWorld init, applyStartGame reset, applyReturnToTitle reset. Drop currentPlayerId from save.ts serialize + applySnapshotCore (Δ3: DELETE the line, not leave). Keep WorldSnapshot.currentPlayerId?: PlayerId as ignored-optional for back-compat. Replace main.ts:978 with asPlayerId(0).

S42 P4 — Strip turn-based input handler. Delete onKeyDown SPACE→END_TURN handler in controls.ts (lines 354-374) + window event listener registration line 127. Update main.ts:394 hint text — drop ' · SPACE end turn (1v1)' suffix only.

S42 P5 — Strip turn badge UI + add localPlayerId field. Delete turnBadge field/creation/sync in ui.ts (~50 LOC). Add world.localPlayerId: PlayerId field (default asPlayerId(0); main.ts onJoinAttempt sets to asPlayerId(1) for client). drawEnergyGauge reads world.localPlayerId + guards `if (!player) return;`. Drop fallback chain.

S42 P6 — Rewrite tests + add race coverage. DELETE session15.test.ts §C END_TURN block (3 tests), §B 2 hotseat-rejection tests, §F currentPlayerId save assertions. DELETE sparkLifecycle.test.ts requireActivePlayer describe + 2 silently-rejects tests. UPDATE world.test.ts: remove ~7 currentPlayerId toggle setups. UPDATE disruptionManager.test.ts: drop currentPlayer opt. UPDATE net/sync.test.ts + net/protocol.test.ts: replace END_TURN refs. ADD race tests: PICKUP race first-wins-second-silent, PLACE-in-zone race two-rejected, PLACE target-vanished race, HUD missing-player guard. Expected: 759 → 756.
S42 P7 — Network protocol sweep. Remove END_TURN: true from KNOWN_GAME_ACTION_TYPES_RECORD in protocol.ts. No protoVersion bump (Council REJECT-1 — allowlist tighten ≠ structural change).
S42 P8 — typecheck + full test suite + bundle. tsc -b --noEmit clean. Vitest 756/756+ green. npm run build under 500 KB cap.

S42 P9 — Commit + deploy + 4-layer verification handshake. git commit + push → gh workflow run --workflow=deploy.yml → gh run watch → curl Last-Modified header advances → bundle grep: (positive shibboleth) raceRejects present (counter shipped), START_GAME_SIGNAL count=2 (S39 still live); (negative shibboleth) END_TURN string absent + currentPlayerId string absent (teardown shipped).

S42 P10 — Reflexion + /handoff. Write S42 reflexion entries (≥5: design-drift-13-sessions, council-r2-sharpened-shared-vs-owned, race-counter-as-observability, blueprint-vs-impl-as-state-discovery-trigger, real-time-first-Intent-wins). Run /handoff. Generate handoff prompt for user.
